GuidePage.Title: Template Page Title
GuidePage.Subtitle: Replace this sentence with a one-line summary of the page.

GuideInfoBox.Title: At a Glance
GuideInfoBox.p: Open with one short box only if the reader needs immediate context, scope, or an operational warning.

GuideSection.Title: First Major Topic
GuideSection.p: Start every section with one lead paragraph before lists, tables, or procedures.

ul.li: Keep steps short and action oriented.
Split long procedures into multiple subsections instead of one wall of text.
Use tables only when readers truly need side-by-side comparison.

GuideExampleBlock.Title: Recommended Pattern
GuideExampleBlock.p: Use example blocks for a preferred workflow, rotation, or decision rule.

GuideWarningBox.Title: Common Failure State
GuideWarningBox.p: Reserve warning boxes for things that can waste supplies, lock out progress, or get the reader killed.
